extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates proceedings filed by and against each entity. I counted only the Company’s “Against our Company” row: 2 criminal, 61 tax and 2 statutory/regulatory proceedings; the Directors, Promoters, Subsidiaries and Group Companies have nil proceedings against them, and all “By” rows were excluded. The quantified amount against the Company is ₹2,359.20 million, with no quantified amount against subsidiaries, so the aggregate group amount is ₹2,359.20 million, converted to ₹235.92 crore; the table notes that the amount excludes claims filed by the Company, including BDT 14.94 million. The contingent-liabilities figure is the stated Total (a) of ₹2,531.06 million as at June 30, 2024, converted to ₹253.106 crore; commitments were excluded. Company-wide top-customer concentration is disclosed for the full financial year ended March 31, 2024 as 63.52% for the top five and 77.89% for the top ten, measured against revenue from operations. The litigation and contingent-liability tables use ₹ million; conversion is by dividing million by 10 because ₹10 million equals ₹1 crore.
